Title: Adaptive grid/layout for tablets and landscape

Description:
Improve the frontend layout to use an adaptive grid that optimizes display for tablets and landscape orientation (e.g., multi-column schedule vs single-column list).

Why:
Better use of wide screens improves usability for event schedules and multi-column views.

Acceptance criteria:
- Implement responsive CSS and breakpoint rules to show multi-column schedule on wide screens.
- Ensure mobile layout remains compact and usable.

Labels: enhancement
